name: Crisp Pasta and Goat Cheese Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 Hearts of palm, cut into 1/4-in slices
16 Cherry tomatoes or yellow teardrop tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pan with hot corn oil, deep-fry the wonton skins one at a time until crisp, about 15 seconds per side (ensure oil does not smoke). Set aside.
2. In a bowl, thoroughly mix goat cheese, cream cheese, sour cream, chives, parsley, thyme, garlic, and shallots. Season to taste with freshly ground pepper. Set aside.
3. To prepare the dressing: In an electric blender, combine mustard, garlic, salt, white pepper, and vinegar. With blender running, slowly add olive oil in a thin, steady stream until mixture reaches dressing consistency. Set aside.
4. To prepare the lettuce: Separate lettuce leaves, then tear each leaf into bite-size pieces. In a large bowl, toss lettuce with dressing using enough to evenly coat all pieces. Set aside.
5. Assemble salads: Place one wonton on each plate, cheese-side up. Add lettuce pieces on top of the wonton. Cover with another wonton, cheese-side down. Some lettuce will spread onto the plate. Garnish each salad with heart of palm slices and cherry/yellow teardrop tomato halves, drizzled with remaining dressing. Makes 4 salads.
